hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Professional Black female American mobile tire technician working on a tire change at a customer's residential driveway, jack + tools visible, service van in background, photorealistic, no text or logos, no signage, confident and capable demeanor, warm natural daylight. [NOTE: use this prompt ONLY if Bruce confirms owner demographics via GBP or owner intake — otherwise default to gender/race-neutral prompt.]
hero.caption_context: Owner-operator model — Quartisha at work reinforces the brand. Mobile-at-customer-driveway is the core differentiator vs shop-based tire chains. Tire change or brake job in-frame; do not stage shop setting.

gallery.context: Tire install — wheel off, new tire mounting. Caption 'Tire install — mobile, all sizes, while you wait'.
Brake pad replacement — caliper off, pad visible. Caption 'Brakes — pads, rotors, full-service mobile'.
Flat tire repair at roadside or driveway. Caption 'Flat repair — roadside, driveway, anywhere'.
Tire rotation + balance. Caption 'Rotation + balance — longer tire life'.
Service van with mobile-tire-shop equipment. Caption 'We come to you — metro Atlanta'.
Quartisha at work OR a completed tire/brake job (wheels on, vehicle ready). Caption names Quartisha if demographics confirmed per reviews.json flag.

sections.context: Atlanta ITP / Decatur / East Point residential streetscape; Unsplash OK if no real photos

notes: Mobile auto specialty vertical — darker filter (0.85 brightness) than detailing/plumbing to communicate 'serious auto work' not 'luxury shine'. Tire + brakes is the whole scope — do NOT include oil-change or diagnostic photos (those would dilute the specialty positioning). Owner demographic positioning flagged in reviews.json — hero prompt conditionally includes demographics only if Bruce confirms. Default to neutral if unverified.
